body:
Codex post-exec review: **APPROVED for closeout**.

Formal GitHub approval is blocked for this auth path (`Resource not accessible by integration`), so recording the verdict here.

Reviewed commit: `6e9d8f41f3d27adfe0923fefc9f3e776cc386e41`
Review packet: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-SUBSTRATE_REVIEW_2026-06-01_12-51-00+0300.md`
Sidecar: `ai_handoffs/NEWPROJECT-SAVE-SUBSTRATE_REVIEW_2026-06-01_12-51-00+0300.meta.json`

Findings: no `Needs Correction` items.
Verification:
- Local `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader --test new_project_save_round_trip -- --nocapture`: 4/4 pass.
- Local `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader --all-targets`: pass across existing loader suites.
- PR CI: powershell, fmt, architecture, cargo-deny, workspace tests, and script-bench compile all green.
- Diff scope: exactly `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs` + `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/new_project_save_round_trip.rs`; 0 `Cargo.toml`; no editor wiring.

One latent non-blocking note is recorded in the packet: no-clobber uses preflight `exists()` checks plus normal writes, not atomic create/rollback. That is acceptable for the intended single-user Save-As flow and existing writer style.
